name: Cloud DX Inc.
summary: Cloud DX Inc. provides remote patient monitoring hardware and software solutions. The company offers Cloud DX Connected Health, an end-to-end virtual healthcare platform for monitoring patients with chronic illness, including COPD and CHF, as well as patients recovering from surgery to large hospitals and provincial health authorities in Canada, and physician practices and hospitals in the United States. Its Cloud DX Connected Health Kits includes its proprietary Pulsewave wrist cuff blood pressure monitor; Cloud DX Bluetooth pulse oximeter; and Cloud DX wireless weight scale and optionally, a digital thermometer and digital wireless glucose meter from 3rd party suppliers. The company also offers CPT Codes for Remote Patient Monitoring; and VITALITI, a vital sign monitor for measuring ECG, heart rate, oxygen saturation, respiration, core body temperature, blood pressure, movement, steps, and posture. Cloud DX Inc. is headquartered in Kitchener, Canada.
